summary: The diff implements user ID-based admin authentication partially. The backend uses a new access control system with a mixin pattern (MixinAuthorization, AccessControl), but the implementation does not match the spec's explicit requirements for user ID storage, principal-to-user-ID mapping, or the specific admin user ID initialization. The diff shows a new authorization module but does not show the required isCallerAdmin method changes, addAdmin method, or user ID mapping logic in backend/main.mo. Frontend changes appear unrelated to admin authentication requirements.

missing_requirements.requirement: Replace principal-based admin authentication with a user ID system that stores and checks admin user IDs
missing_requirements.reason: The diff shows a new AccessControl module and MixinAuthorization pattern, but does not show the required user ID storage list or the isCallerAdmin method checking user IDs. The backend/main.mo truncation prevents verification of the complete implementation.

missing_requirements.requirement: Create a backend method addAdmin(userId: Text) that can only be called by existing admins
missing_requirements.reason: No addAdmin method is visible in the truncated backend/main.mo diff. The AccessControl module import suggests new authorization logic, but the specific addAdmin method is not shown.

missing_requirements.requirement: Map Internet Identity principals to user IDs and use user IDs for all admin checks
missing_requirements.reason: No principal-to-user-ID mapping logic is visible in the diff. The backend uses AccessControl.isAdmin(accessControlState, caller) and AccessControl.hasPermission checks with principals, but no user ID generation or mapping is shown.

missing_requirements.requirement: Initialize backend admin system with specific user ID '7cho6-twidd-xljev-okmzv-oebuv-llwo6-5tmzy-3n3pb-4nhg5-54713-aae' during canister initialization
missing_requirements.reason: No initialization code with the specific admin user ID is visible in the truncated backend/main.mo. The AccessControl.initState() call suggests initialization, but the hardcoded admin user ID is not shown.

hallucinated_features.description: Authorization mixin pattern with MixinAuthorization and AccessControl modules
hallucinated_features.reason: The spec requires changes to backend/main.mo's admin authentication system, but does not request a mixin architecture or separate authorization modules. This is a different implementation approach than specified.

hallucinated_features.description: Migration module for video clips schema
hallucinated_features.reason: The spec does not request any migration logic or schema changes for video clips. The migration.mo file transforms OldActor clips to NewActor videoClips, which is unrelated to admin authentication requirements.
